title: Lack of AI governance framework
description: Our company has no clear policies for AI usage, leading to shadow AI adoption by individual departments.
description_en: Our company has no clear policies for AI usage, leading to shadow AI adoption by individual departments.

title: Schlechte Datenqualität für KI-Training
description: Unsere historischen Daten sind unvollständig und inkonsistent, was das Training von ML-Modellen erheblich erschwert.
title_en: Poor data quality for AI training
description_en: Our historical data is incomplete and inconsistent, which significantly hinders training ML models.

title: AI model explainability missing
description: Stakeholders and regulators demand explainable decisions, but our black-box models cannot provide clear reasoning for their outputs.
description_en: Stakeholders and regulators demand explainable decisions, but our black-box models cannot provide clear reasoning for their outputs.

title: Employee resistance to AI adoption
description: Many employees fear job displacement and actively resist using AI tools, limiting ROI on our AI investments.
description_en: Many employees fear job displacement and actively resist using AI tools, limiting ROI on our AI investments.

title: Keine DSGVO-konforme KI-Datenpipeline
description: Wir verarbeiten personenbezogene Daten in unseren KI-Modellen ohne ausreichende Datenschutzmaßnahmen, was zu Compliance-Risiken führt.
description_en: We process personal data in our AI models without sufficient privacy measures, leading to compliance risks.
